Self.Wiki: Defines parameters used for boss moves that trigger enemy generators.

dummyPolyBeginId.Wiki: The dummy polygon on which the generated enemy is spawned.

dummyPolyEndId.Wiki: The dummy polygon on which the generated enemy is spawned.

isCopyPlayerProtector.Wiki: If enabled, the player armor is inherited by the generated enemy.

isAnotherWorld.Wiki: If enabled, the generated enemy is from another world (mirror break?)
